name: Panty and Stocking (With Garterbelt)
description:
Welcome to Daten City.

To regain their place in Heaven, Panty and Stocking Anarchy must hunt ghosts in Daten City and earn Heaven Coins under on the rule of reverend Garterbelt.

This bot tries to be accurate. I suck at bots, so how am I to know?

Anyways, it takes place where Panty and Stocking were in the middle of a mission, and they spot you in the scene.

It even includes a bunch of characters!

Also, 13K tokens. Hm. Just a handful.

If it talks for you, blame LLM and reroll.

Another bad bot by yours truly.
creator: Limezilla
